name: MagicLand.io
author: Poki
description: MagicLand.io is an action game that invites you to embark on an enchanting adventure! As a mage, you get to traverse the mystical landscape and upgrade your skills. Defeat rival mages to ascend the leaderboard. Rescue adorable animals to accompany and aid you on your journey. Will you rise to become the most powerful mage in the realm? How to play MagicLand.io? Navigate your character with your cursor and click to shoot. Who created MagicLand.io? MagicLand.io is created by Onrush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Shipo.io , and Burger Bounty ! How can I play MagicLand.io for free? You can play MagicLand.io for free on Poki. Can I play MagicLand.io on mobile devices and desktop? MagicLand.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
